title: DRDO DLJ Paid Internship Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
short_info: Defence Laboratory Jodhpur (DRDO DLJ) Paid Internship Notification 2026 has been released under Advertisement No. DLJ/HRD/PAIDINTERNSHIP/2026/01 on the official website of DRDO. A total of 9 vacancies have been announced through the DRDO DLJ Paid Internship Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Pursuing Graduate in Engineering / Post Graduate in Science, full time course in the respective discipline from a AICTE/UGC recognized Indian University/Institute (Final year students only)

selection_process: CGPA based selection Online interview / interaction Merit basis Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DRDO DLJ Paid Internship Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
